data.title: Solana climbs back into tokenization spotlight as R3 brings big banks to its rails
data.description:
Software development firm R3 has agreed to a deal with Solana Foundation to let its customers use the Solana network. The move could see Solana become a major tokenization hub. The UK-based firm announced the deal today, noting that collaboration will allow regulated financial institutions to bring their tokenized real-world assets to the network. R3 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-climbs-back-into-tokenization-spotlight-as-r3-brings-big-banks-to-its-rails/

data.title: US Supreme Court bans Trump from firing anyone at the Federal Reserve
data.description:
The Supreme Court has officially placed a legal firewall around the Federal Reserve, blocking President Trump from removing its board members. In a major ruling issued Thursday, the court told the White House that the Fed is off-limits, even though Trump is currently allowed to fire officials from two other federal boards. This legal distinction […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/supreme-court-bans-trump-touching-the-fed/

data.title: BNPP AM Launches Native Digital Shares on Allfunds Blockchain
data.description:
According to Odaily, BNP Paribas Asset Management (BNPP AM) has issued native digital shares of a money market fund (MMF) on the Allfunds Blockchain. Unlike most tokenized funds that are based on existing funds, this initiative involves the creation of entirely new native digital shares. These shares were subsequently used in a cross-border transaction with a French counterparty. BNPP AM acted as the transfer agent and transaction service provider, while Allfunds Blockchain served as the technology partner.

The appeal of this initiative lies in its potential to enhance efficiency by shifting from bulk subscription and redemption to real-time trading based on net asset value. Additionally, with the anticipated introduction of a wholesale DLT settlement solution by the European Central Bank, faster settlement times are expected.

BNPP AM's move also explores the potential of MMF tokenization to attract both crypto-native institutions and retail investors.

data.title: U.S. Vice President Vance to Speak at Bitcoin 2025 Conference in Las Vegas
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Vice President Vance is scheduled to deliver a speech at the 'Bitcoin 2025' conference in Las Vegas on May 28. The event is expected to draw significant attention from the cryptocurrency community and industry leaders.

data.title: Bitwise General Counsel: Trump's involvement will help the crypto industry, and lawmakers should promote a regulatory framework
data.description: Katherine Dowling, general counsel at Bitwise, said that despite concerns that Trump's meme coin could create a "pay-for-participation" environment, his involvement in the crypto industry "is helpful." She called on lawmakers to "ignore the political noise" and move crypto legislation forward.

data.title: BNP Paribas Asset Management issues tokenized money market fund units on Allfunds blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BNP Paribas Asset Management (BNPP AM) has issued native digital shares of a money market fund (MMF) on the Allfunds blockchain. Most tokenized funds are based on existing funds, but this time a new native digital share is created. The new share was then used in a cross-border transaction with a French counterparty. BNPP AM serves as a transfer agent and transaction service provider, and Allfunds Blockchain is a technical partner. The appeal of this solution lies in the improvement of efficiency and the shift from bulk subscription and redemption to instant transactions at net value. In addition, faster settlement is expected after the European Central Bank launches a wholesale DLT settlement solution. BNPP AM is also exploring the potential of MMF tokenization to attract crypto-native institutions and retail investors.

data.title: Centrifuge Brings RWAs of $400M U.S. Treasury Fund to Solana
data.description: Centrifuge announced that it will expand its tokenized asset services to the Solana blockchain, starting with the $400 million tokenized U.S. Treasury bond fund (JTRSY) managed by Anemoy. The deJTRSY token corresponding to the fund will enable Solana users to earn returns on short-term Treasury bonds on platforms such as Raydium, Kamino and Lulo. Centrifuge said that the expansion is based on its "deRWA token" standard, which allows tokens to be freely transferred and used between DeFi protocols. The Solana Foundation also partnered with R3, a blockchain technology company focused on banks, this week to introduce real-world assets, and the Apollo Credit Asset Fund issued by Securitize will also be connected to the DeFi protocol of the Solana ecosystem.
